entities.name: user-facing monetization
entities.context: Prioritized revenue strategy for early stages - charging users directly for ongoing usage

entities.name: company-facing models
entities.context: Deprioritized revenue approach where companies pay to be surfaced to users

entities.name: ongoing usage revenue
entities.context: Revenue model based on continuous use rather than one-time or employer payments

relationships.context: Contrasting monetization approaches - user-facing prioritized over company-facing in early stages
Ongoing usage is the mechanism driving user-facing revenue
